title: Engagement Setup
description: Contract for the output of the Fieldwork Engagement Setup web app. This is the single source of truth consumed by the Office.js add-in to drive assertion-risk matrix generation, workpaper scaffolding, and downstream testing. Locked seam between the web intake and the Excel add-in.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this engagement was captured against. Bump for breaking changes.

engagementId.description: Stable identifier for the engagement. Used as the join key across Supabase tables and storage objects.

name.description: Legal name of the audit client.

fiscalYearEnd.description: Last day of the fiscal year being audited (ISO 8601 date).

reportingPeriodStart.description: First day of the fiscal year being audited. Optional; derived as fiscalYearEnd minus 1 year when omitted.

framework.description: Audit framework selected for this engagement. Drives workpaper and assertion-mapping templates.

industry.description: Client industry. Drives industry-specific workpaper variants and risk templates.

pyAuditFile.description: Prior-year signed audit opinion plus accompanying issued financial statements only (not the full PY binder). PDF.

cyTrialBalanceFile.description: Current-year trial balance. Excel (.xlsx) or CSV.

narrative.description: Free-text overview of the engagement's risk profile. Optional supplement to structured items.

items.description: Structured list of identified risks. Each item is consumed by the assertion-risk matrix generator.

narrative.description: Free-text overview of significant CY business changes. Optional supplement to structured items.

items.description: Structured list of significant changes since the prior year (management, systems, M&A, new products, etc.).

currency.description: Reporting currency. v1 supports USD only; multi-currency is out of scope per PRD.

overallMateriality.description: Overall materiality for the engagement, in the reporting currency.

performanceMateriality.description: Performance materiality used to scope individual account testing.

clearlyTrivialThreshold.description: Threshold below which misstatements are clearly trivial and need not be accumulated.

basis.description: Plain-language description of how the three thresholds were derived (e.g., 5% of pretax income; PM = 75% of overall; CTT = 5% of PM).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this engagement was first captured.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent edit.

storagePath.description: Bucket-relative path of the uploaded file in Supabase Storage.

contentType.description: MIME type as reported by the browser at upload.
